posts.author: Manu10 (Manuel Martínez Cánovas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

I need to be able to create a cumulative bar chart with the workload per week on the x-axis and sorting it by status. I don’t know if this is possible at the moment, but I don’t know how to do it because the data from the workload can’t be extrapolated.

I would also like to know if it is possible to create a reference line through a formula column so that it varies or if it always has to be a preset constant value.
